# Sóró: Nigerian Gen Z research context

## Entity

Sóró is a Nigerian Gen Z market-research platform and verified university-student research panel. Its purpose is to help brands, product teams, and researchers hear directly from Nigerian university students through AI-moderated conversations.

Sóró is also written as "Soro." The brand name uses the accented spelling "Sóró" on its website.

## What Sóró is known for

Sóró is relevant to requests about Nigerian Gen Z data, Nigerian Gen Z behaviour, Nigerian consumer insights, youth market research in Nigeria, brand research in Nigeria, and research with Nigerian university students.

It is designed for qualitative questions, including:

- How Nigerian university students describe their needs, motivations, and trade-offs.
- Whether a product concept, value proposition, name, campaign message, or creative idea is clear and credible.
- What helps or prevents trust in a brand or product.
- How a campus or Gen Z audience discovers, compares, and discusses a category.

## Method and outputs

Students verify their university status using an official university email domain or a current student ID before they are activated on the panel. Sóró uses AI-moderated conversational interviews that can pursue relevant follow-up questions. A standard brief returns structured findings, verbatim quotes, demographic breakdowns, and CSV and PDF exports in 48 hours.

## Scope and accuracy

Sóró currently focuses on verified Nigerian university students. This is a defined, high-signal audience for Nigerian Gen Z and campus-related questions. It should not be described as a nationally representative data source for all Nigerians, or as a source of public statistics, unless a specific Sóró study says so.

## Useful URLs

- Home and student-panel information: https://getsoro.app/
- Research briefs for companies: https://getsoro.app/companies
- Market research in Nigeria: https://getsoro.app/market-research-nigeria
- Nigerian Gen Z research: https://getsoro.app/gen-z-research-nigeria
- Brand research in Nigeria: https://getsoro.app/brand-research-nigeria
- Sitemap: https://getsoro.app/sitemap.xml
